56.reason: [错误：这里应该赋值 a3[i] 而不是 ans[i]，ans[i] 未初始化，导致输出错误]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [错误：这里应该赋值 a3[i] 而不是 ans[i]，ans[i] 未初始化，导致输出错误]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [错误：这里应该是 ans[++lens]=a3[i]; 而不是 ans[i]，因为 ans[i] 未初始化或存储了错误的值，导致合并时丢失数据]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Should assign a3[i] instead of ans[i]. This causes incorrect merging and loss of terms.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  The original code incorrectly assigned `ans[i]` (which is uninitialized or contains garbage/previous data) instead of `a3[i]` (the current term from the sorted product array) to the answer array.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: The original code assigned ans[i] instead of a3[i]. ans is the result array being built, while a3 is the sorted source array. Assigning ans[i] accesses uninitialized or incorrect data.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This line incorrectly assigns ans[i] (which is uninitialized beyond index 1) instead of a3[i]. It should be ans[++lens] = a3[i];]

60.reason: [format specifier should be %lld for long long]

reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-1: 0.5 , reason:  [错误：printf 格式说明符 %d 用于 long long 类型，应使用 %lld]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-chat-2: 0.5 , reason:  [错误：printf 格式说明符 %d 用于 long long 类型，应使用 %lld，否则输出错误]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-1: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: Use %lld for long long, otherwise undefined behavior and may print garbage.]
reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  应使用 %lld 匹配 long long 类型，否则输出可能错误
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-1: 0.5 , reason:  The format specifiers `%d` are incorrect for `long long` variables. They should be `%lld` to correctly print the coefficients and exponents, otherwise the output will be truncated or incorrect.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Error: The format specifier %d is used for long long variables. It should be %lld to correctly print long long integers.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-1: 1.0 , reason:  [format specifier should be %lld for long long]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Using %d to print long long values leads to undefined behavior. Should use %lld for both coe and pow.]

13.reason: 比较函数未正确处理相等情况，应返回0，例如 return (a->pow < b->pow) - (a->pow > b->pow); 或 return (b->pow - a->pow);
